parameters.name: body
parameters.description: [MOD-DI-MSG-1] MsgStoreDigest stores a digest on behalf of a corporation.

post.summary:
UpdateParams defines a (governance) operation for updating the module
parameters. The authority defaults to the x/gov module account.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: MsgUpdateParams is the Msg/UpdateParams request type.

authority.description:
authority is the corporation (group account) on whose behalf this message
is executed.

operator.description: operator is the account authorized by the corporation to run this Msg.

digest.description:
digest is the digest string to store (SRI format; the algorithm is encoded
in the prefix, e.g. sha256-/sha384-/sha512-).

verana.di.v1.MsgStoreDigest.description: [MOD-DI-MSG-1] MsgStoreDigest stores a digest on behalf of a corporation.

verana.di.v1.MsgStoreDigestResponse.description: MsgStoreDigestResponse defines the response for MsgStoreDigest.

authority.description: authority is the address that controls the module (defaults to x/gov unless overwritten).

params.description:
params defines the module parameters to update.

NOTE: All parameters must be supplied.

verana.di.v1.MsgUpdateParams.description: MsgUpdateParams is the Msg/UpdateParams request type.

verana.di.v1.MsgUpdateParamsResponse.description:
MsgUpdateParamsResponse defines the response structure for executing a
MsgUpdateParams message.

verana.di.v1.Params.description: Params defines the parameters for the module.
